name: Bromise
overview: The story of a young policeman who was falsely accused of a crime he didn’t commit by a more senior corrupted policeman. During his time in prison, he comes to meet a few people with similar stories as him. Together, they break out of jail with a mission to fight against injustice and take down the corrupted.

trailers.title: ตัวอย่างซีรีส์ สัตย์เสือ BROMISE [Official Trailer] | MONO ORIGINAL
